creator: dervish@ganja.nubisci.net
text:
XFree86-4 (4.0.1) server will fail to start for users of Mach64 based video adapters.
Server will fail with the following diagnostic in /var/log/XFree86.0.log:

	"INVALID IO ALLOCATION" (or "Unsupported XCLK source" on ATI Mach64").

Fix: Apply the following patch retrived from XFree86.org (changed to diff -urN)

	http://www.xfree86.org/pipermail/newbie/2000-September/001134.html

How-To-Repeat: Type startx<return> or XFree86<return> after building and installing the XFree86-4 port.
